portfolio.aboutText:
I am sure I can contribute significantly to the team because I hold strong foundation in mobile software development and a broad skill set that includes Android, Flutter, Swift-UI, Node.js, Spring Boot, and CI/CD. 

Because of my background in both cross-platform and native mobile development, I can approach projects from a variety of angles. I am especially skilled at putting in place effective development workflows and creating reliable, high-performing apps. Consistent code quality and efficient deployments are guaranteed by my expertise with CI/CD pipelines. 

I can't wait to use my broad technical expertise and enthusiasm for designing outstanding user experiences.
portfolio.skillsList: Android,Kotlin,Kotlin Multi Platform,Java,Dart,Flutter,Maestro Ui Testing framework,AWS MQTT,AWS Cognito services,Health Connect Sdk

projects.challenges:

Performance optimization | Use lazy loading, code splitting, and caching

projects.name: Hitachi AC Customer Care
projects.detailDescription:
How to make use of HITACHI Mobile Application:
1. Join Hitachi Family by registering yourself (Only authentication required for existing Hitachi customer)
2. Automatically logged in based on your registered mobile number
3. Add your new products
4. Request for service
5. Track Service Request
6. Opt for AMC & Extended Warranty pack
7. Digital Quotation & Receipt
8. Write to Hitachi
projects.description: HITACHI India facilitate mobile based solution to connect Hitachi for Service.

projects.features:
For Students & Parents 

• Calendar Events: Stay updated on exams, events, and key dates 
• To-do’s: Track tasks, deadlines, and schoolwork 
• Announcements: Get real-time school updates 
• Attendance: View daily attendance records 
• Timetable: Check personalized class schedules 
• Assessments & Assignments: 
  • View marks & exam schedules 
 • Track progress & homework 
• Homeworks: See and manage homework tasks 
• Leave Applications: Submit and track leave requests 
• Cards: Access digital student/parent ID 
• Messages: Chat directly with teachers & school staff 
• Learning: View subjects, teachers & resources 
• Consents: Submit consents for school activities 
• Session Dashboard: Quick view of academic progress 
• My Reports: Access report cards & performance summaries 
• Financial Overview: View fees, payments & balances 
For Teachers 

• Calendar Events: Stay on top of school events 
• To-do’s: Manage teaching tasks & reminders 
• Announcements: Share updates with students & parents 
• Attendance: Record class & activity attendance 
• Timetable: View your teaching schedule 
• Classwork: Share resources & materials 
• My Subjects: Manage your assigned courses 
• My Students: Access student info & performance 
• Cards: Access digital teacher ID 
• Messages: Communicate with students & parents 
• Consents: Manage consents 
• My Reports: View teaching reports & class data

projects.description: Classter is the ultimate school management app that connects students, parents, and teachers with everything happening at your institution. Anywhere, Anytime.
projects.name: Classter
projects.detailDescription:
Designed to work alongside Classter’s all-in-one School Management System, this mobile app provides instant access to academic information, communication tools, and real-time updates. All from your smartphone. 

Built for all types of educational institutions (including schools, colleges, universities, and training centers) Classter makes it easy to stay connected, organized, and informed. 

Whether you're a student checking your latest grades, a parent tracking attendance, or a teacher managing assignments, Classter makes your organizations life simpler, smarter, and more connected. 

With personalized dashboards for every user and real-time notifications, Classter bridges the gap between school and home, making communication easier and school information more accessible than ever.

projects.features:
Vehicle Dashboard – Monitor speed, range, battery health, and performance stats in real time.
Smart Connectivity – Bluetooth pairing with Matter vehicles for navigation, calls, and media.
Ride Analytics – Track trip history, riding patterns, and efficiency reports.
Remote Access – Lock/unlock, locate vehicle, and get alerts remotely.
Charging Management – Find nearby charging stations and monitor charging status.
Service & Support – Book service appointments, raise support tickets, and access manuals.
Over-the-Air Updates (OTA) – Receive the latest software updates directly on your vehicle.
Community & Rewards – Join the Matter riders’ community and earn loyalty rewards.
projects.tech: Android, Kotlin, Custom SDK, Custom crashlytics
projects.challenges:
System integration with vehicle hardware | Develop secure APIs and drivers to interface with ECU and sensors
Real-time performance monitoring | Optimize data pipelines for low-latency updates from vehicle systems
Limited resources on vehicle OS | Use lightweight Flutter/Dart modules and efficient memory management
Offline functionality | Implement local storage and caching for features without network dependency
Security concerns | Apply encryption, secure authentication, and over-the-air (OTA) patching
User experience design | Create a simplified, distraction-free UI tailored for in-vehicle use
Connectivity challenges | Enable seamless Bluetooth, Wi-Fi, and 4G/5G switching
OTA updates | Build reliable update mechanism with rollback options
Testing on hardware | Set up simulators and on-road testing cycles for validation
Regulatory compliance | Ensure adherence to automotive safety and data privacy standards

projects.name: Matter Motor Works
projects.detailDescription: The Matter Motor Works App is a smart companion for Matter’s next-generation motorcycles and EVs, designed to enhance rider experience, safety, and connectivity. The app enables users to seamlessly connect their vehicle with their smartphone, providing real-time insights, advanced controls, and personalized services.
projects.description: A smart in-vehicle app built with Android Kotlin, providing riders with real-time vehicle insights, seamless connectivity, and a simplified OS interface as the single point of access.

projects.challenges:
Code sharing across platforms | Use common modules for business logic and platform-specific layers for UI
Different platform APIs | Implement expect/actual declarations to bridge platform-specific features
Dependency compatibility | Choose libraries with KMP support or write wrappers for non-supported ones
Build configuration complexity | Standardize Gradle setup and use KMP templates for consistency
Testing across platforms | Write shared tests in common modules and platform-specific tests separately
Performance optimization | Profile platform code and minimize JNI/native calls
Team skill gap | Provide training on Kotlin Multiplatform patterns and tooling
Debugging challenges | Use multiplatform-friendly tools and logs for better traceability
Evolving ecosystem | Stay updated with latest KMP releases and community libraries
App store compliance | Ensure each platform build meets respective store guidelines
projects.developmentProcess:
Requirement Analysis | Define features, supported platforms, and shared vs native scope
Planning | Break down modules into common and platform-specific layers
Architecture Design | Choose patterns (Clean Architecture/MVVM) for shared and native code
Environment Setup | Configure Gradle, Kotlin Multiplatform plugin, and CI/CD pipeline
Core Development | Implement shared business logic, networking, and data layers
Platform-specific Development | Build native UI and integrations for Android, iOS, Web, Desktop
Integration | Connect shared modules with platform UIs and APIs
Testing | Write common unit tests and platform-specific integration tests
Optimization | Profile performance and fine-tune memory, networking, and database usage
Deployment | Build and release apps for Play Store, App Store, Web, or Desktop
Maintenance | Update shared code, sync dependencies, and support new platform updates
projects.techStack:
Kotlin Multiplatform | Shared codebase for Android, iOS, Desktop, and Web
Ktor | Multiplatform networking library for HTTP APIs
SQLDelight | Multiplatform database with type-safe SQL and Kotlin APIs
Coroutines | Asynchronous programming for concurrency across platforms
Serialization (kotlinx.serialization) | JSON and data serialization across platforms
Compose Multiplatform | UI framework for Android, Desktop, and Web
SwiftUI/Jetpack Compose | Native UI layers for iOS and Android respectively
Koin | Dependency injection for shared and platform-specific modules
Gradle (KMP plugin) | Build system for managing multiplatform projects
Firebase/Analytics SDKs | Platform-specific integrations for analytics and crash reporting
projects.features:
- Precision Light Schedules: Automate lighting cycles tailored to each crop's growth stage.
- Adaptive Dimming: Dynamically adjust light intensity to optimize growth and save energy.
- Multi-Channel Spectrum Control: Customize light spectrum to meet the specific needs of different crops and growth phases.
- Sensor Integration: Sync lighting with real-time weather and environmental data.
- Remote Access: Control and monitor your greenhouse lighting anytime, anywhere.
- Energy Optimization: Maximize plant performance while reducing energy usage.
- Scalable Design: Suited for greenhouses of all sizes, from nurseries to industrial greenhouses.
projects.tech: Kotlin Multi Platform (Android Kotlin, IOS Swift UI)
projects.detailDescription: Take full control of your greenhouse environment with HortiControls. Designed specifically for greenhouse environments, HortiControls helps you create the perfect lighting and environmental conditions for your crops, ensuring healthy growth, higher yields, and sustainable energy use. From small-scale growers to large commercial greenhouses, HortiControls delivers advanced lighting solutions tailored to the unique needs of your crops.
projects.name: HortiControls
projects.description: HortiControls helps growers optimize lighting and environment for healthier crops, higher yields, and sustainable energy use.

Whether you’re a homeowner, office manager, or designer, our app makes it simple to create the perfect atmosphere with just a tap on your phone. No more complicated wiring, no more guesswork—just effortless control, personalization, and energy savings.

projects.techStack:
Android (Kotlin + XML) | Developed native Android app with clean architecture and MVVM pattern.
Python (Django/Flask) | Built backend REST APIs for user, course, and progress management.
Celery | Managed asynchronous tasks like analytics, reports, and notifications.
Firebase Cloud Messaging (FCM) | Enabled reliable push notification delivery to users.
Room Database | Provided local caching and offline data persistence on Android.
WorkManager | Scheduled background sync and periodic data uploads.
JWT Authentication | Ensured secure and scalable user authentication and session handling.
projects.developmentProcess:
Requirement Analysis | Gathered app objectives, LMS functionalities, and offline training needs.
UI/UX Design | Created wireframes and interactive prototypes for user-friendly navigation.
Backend Architecture Design | Planned Python-based REST API structure with modular services.
Database Schema Design | Modeled relational entities for users, courses, and progress tracking.
API Development | Built and tested Django/Flask APIs for authentication, data sync, and reporting.
Android App Development | Implemented native Kotlin app with MVVM, Room, and WorkManager.
Testing & QA | Performed unit, integration, and user acceptance testing.
Performance Optimization | Improved API response time and reduced app loading delays.
Deployment | Deployed backend on AWS and published Android app to Play Store.
Maintenance & Updates | Monitored performance, fixed bugs, and rolled out feature enhancements.
projects.challenges:
Offline sync failures | Added local caching and background sync via WorkManager.
Auth and session issues | Implemented secure JWT-based authentication.
Slow bulk data operations | Used pagination, compression, and threading.
Unreliable push notifications | Switched to Firebase Cloud Messaging (FCM).
User progress tracking issues | Improved LMS logic for detailed activity logs.
Complex role-based access | Built dynamic permission system via backend APIs.
Slow reporting dashboards | Added Celery async tasks and Redis caching.
High API latency | Optimized endpoints and used CDN caching.
App–backend version mismatch | Enforced API versioning and CI/CD validation.
projects.description: RISE is a prestigious project undertaken by John Snow India Pvt. Ltd. for the Ministry of Health & Family Welfare (MoHFW) that aims to build and enhance knowledge and skills of vaccinators in India.
projects.name: RISE-Immunization Training App
projects.detailDescription: It is an easy-to-use, learner centric app that will help deliver interactive and technically approved learning content, allow training course uploading and administration, populate relevant learner and supervisor dashboards, track assessment score and generate e-certificates and push notifications to users. In short, it is equipped with all functionalities of a best in class Learning Management System. This multifaceted app allows users to learn and complete their coursework on smartphones, tablets or PCs, giving greater flexibility of time and location to them. Besides, it can operate offline and bookmark your progress, so you need not fret if you lose internet connectivity! The RISE app is one of the key elements of an alternative capacity building methodology and it aims to support and complement existing instructor led routine immunization sessions and also provide real-time performance related data to supervisors to further help mentor and coach vaccinators who provide vaccination services (amongst others) to millions of Indians.
